description: Compare two implementations and find every difference. Use when: "compare X with Y", "check X against Y", "verify X matches Y", "flag anything missing", "比對 X 和 Y", "檢查有沒有漏掉", "驗證是否一致", feature parity review between old and new systems, spec vs implementation verification, cross-system completeness check. Not for debugging a single discrepancy or writing comparison tests.

results.query: audit the console billing page against the legacy Panel. Make sure we haven't missed any fields or calculations in the monthly statement view.
compare the old CRM's client list page (_reference/crm/) with our new Vue 3 implementation in frontend/. Check every field, filter, sort option, and export feature.
verify that our Rust P&L calculation matches the gobe implementation. Compare the FIFO logic step by step — I want to know every divergence.
check our API responses against the OpenAPI spec. Are there fields in the spec that we're not returning, or fields we return that aren't documented?
do a systematic comparison of the scheduler executor implementations — compare what gobe's cron jobs do vs what our Rust ticket executors do. Flag anything missing.
should we prioritize finishing the audit or shipping the notification feature? Need different perspectives.
give me a retrospective on the last 2 weeks of commits — how much time went to auditing vs new features?
debug why the P&L numbers don't match between PEACE and Panel for user 1234 on 2026-03-15
read _reference/gobe/app/cockpit/hestia.go and explain the equity calculation logic
write tests that verify our billing calculation matches the expected output from the legacy system
